_readme: Chart config for Bar / Line / Area charts. Same shape works for chart_type 'Bar', 'Line', 'Area'. The x_axis is one dimension; y_axis.series can hold multiple measures (each renders as a separate series).
_notes: data_type on dimension: String for text, Date for time series (then add granularity: 'day'|'month'|'year').
stack: true gives a stacked bar; false (or omitted) gives grouped bars.
If your source query is already aggregated (e.g. SELECT item, SUM(qty) GROUP BY item), still set aggregation:'sum' here — sum-of-pre-summed is identity.
